title: Methods of partition
doc_html:
TITLE IX

PARTITION BETWEEN CO-OWNERS

CHAPTER 1.  GENERAL DISPOSITIONS

Art. 4601.  Methods of partition

Partition of property may be made either nonjudicially or judicially.
doc_text:
TITLE IX
PARTITION BETWEEN CO-OWNERS
CHAPTER 1.  GENERAL DISPOSITIONS
Art. 4601.  Methods of partition
Partition of property may be made either nonjudicially or judicially.
